cases.description: List largest tables by storage in the evals database
cases.input: Show me the 10 largest tables in {EVALS_DATABASE} ranked by storage consumption.

cases.description: List SQL executed against evals_orders over the past 14 days
cases.input: Show me all queries run against evals_orders over the last 14 days.

cases.description: Show queries executed by a specific user over the past 14 days
cases.input: Show me what queries John_Smith has been executing over the past 14 days.

cases.description: Storage allocated to the evals database
cases.input: How much disk space is allocated to the {EVALS_DATABASE} database?

cases.description: Which users are consuming the most resources in the evals database
cases.input: Which users are consuming the most resources in {EVALS_DATABASE}?

cases.description: System-wide CPU/memory/IO by application over the past month
cases.input: Show me how much CPU, memory, and I/O was consumed over the past month, grouped by application.

cases.description: Get current Teradata software version
cases.input: What release of Teradata software is currently running on our system?

cases.description: System throttling and delay statistics for a date range
cases.input: Show me the system throttling and flow control delay statistics from January 15th 2024 through February 28th 2024.

cases.description: Feature utilization metrics for a date range
cases.input: Show me how different Teradata features were being utilized by our users between January 15th, 2024 and March 31st, 2024.

cases.description: How long users waited in queues for a date range
cases.input: Show me how long users were waiting in the query queue between March 1st 2024 and March 31st 2024.

cases.description: Active sessions for a specific user
cases.input: Show me what active connections the database user SALES_ADMIN currently has open in Teradata.

cases.description: Total disk consumption across all databases
cases.input: How much disk capacity is currently being consumed across all databases in our data warehouse?

cases.description: Ranking tables by size inside one database should prefer dba_tableSpace, not dba_databaseSpace
cases.input: Which tables in {EVALS_DATABASE} are using the most disk space?

cases.description: Storage for one named database should prefer dba_databaseSpace, not dba_systemSpace
cases.input: How much total space is the {EVALS_DATABASE} database using?

cases.description: Warehouse-wide storage across all databases should prefer dba_systemSpace, not dba_databaseSpace
cases.input: What is the total disk usage across the entire Teradata system?

cases.description: Queries run against a table should prefer dba_tableSqlList, not dba_userSqlList
cases.input: What SQL has been executed against evals_orders in the past week?

cases.description: Queries run by a specific user should prefer dba_userSqlList, not dba_tableSqlList
cases.input: List all SQL statements that user ANALYTICS_USER has run over the past 7 days.

cases.description: Heavy users of a specific database should prefer dba_tableUsageImpact, not dba_resusageSummary
cases.input: Who is generating the heaviest workload against {EVALS_DATABASE}?

cases.description: System-wide CPU/memory/I/O by application should prefer dba_resusageSummary, not dba_tableUsageImpact
cases.input: Break down CPU, memory, and I/O consumption by application over the last 30 days.

cases.description: Historical resource consumption by users in a database should prefer dba_tableUsageImpact, not dba_sessionInfo
cases.input: Which users have been consuming the most CPU and query resources in {EVALS_DATABASE} over time?

cases.description: Open sessions for a specific user should prefer dba_sessionInfo, not dba_tableUsageImpact
cases.input: What active sessions does user SALES_ADMIN currently have open?

cases.description: How long users waited in queues should prefer dba_userDelay, not dba_flowControl
cases.input: How long were users waiting in the query queue between March 1 and March 31, 2024?

cases.description: System throttling and flow-control statistics should prefer dba_flowControl, not dba_userDelay
cases.input: Show throttling and flow-control delay statistics from January 15 through February 28, 2024.

cases.description: Agent must ask which database to list biggest tables for
cases.input: Show me the biggest tables

cases.description: Agent must ask which table to list queries for
cases.input: Show me the queries from the last 14 days

cases.description: Agent must ask which user to list queries for
cases.input: Show me the queries a user executed over the past 14 days

cases.description: Agent must ask which database to get storage for
cases.input: How much space is a specific database using?

cases.description: Agent must ask which database to evaluate usage impact for
cases.input: Which users are hitting a particular database the most?

cases.description: Agent asks which database, then calls dba_databaseSpace after user clarifies

turns.input: How much space is a specific database using?
How much disk space is the {EVALS_DATABASE} database using?

turns.input: Show me the queries from the last 14 days

cases.description: Agent asks which user, then calls dba_userSqlList after user clarifies

turns.input: Show me the queries a user executed over the past 14 days

cases.description: User asks for something no DBA tool supports — agent should explain and ask for clarification
cases.input: Automatically redistribute my table data across AMPs to improve skew
